journal_entry.reason: Land acquired (including building for demolition) at present value of 6 annual instalments of $10,000,000 at 6% market rate, with discount on long-term borrowings as contra-liability

output.reasoning: Transaction describes acquisition of land and building for demolition. No tax is mentioned in the text. Land purchases are typically not subject to HST (exempt supply under Excise Tax Act).

ambiguities.aspect: Building acquired for demolition - land vs building allocation
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: Building acquired for demolition - entire cost is allocated to land (IAS 16 / IFRS convention for buildings acquired for demolition).

ambiguities.aspect: Payment structure - present value vs face value
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: IFRS requires deferred payment arrangements beyond normal credit terms to be recorded at present value; 6 annual instalments with stated 6% market rate requires PV calculation.

ambiguities.input_contextualized_conventional_defaul: Text does not mention demolition costs - only states building will be demolished; no amount stated means no entry for demolition costs.

output_decision_maker.proceed_reason: IFRS rules resolve building-for-demolition as land, and the stated market rate (6%) with payment terms (6 annual instalments of $10M) provides all inputs needed for PV calculation by the downstream agent.
output_decision_maker.overall_final_rationale: All aspects are resolved by IFRS rules: building acquired for demolition is allocated entirely to land, deferred payment is recorded at present value using the stated 6% market rate, and the downstream calculator can compute the PV of the annuity.
